cases.title: TS-04: Unauthenticated POST /check-in returns 401 Unauthenticated
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header is present
Active session exists with valid QR token for check-in payload
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId, latitude, and longitude and no auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401
Assert response body contains outcome Unauthenticated and errorCode Unauthenticated
Query attendance records for the session and submitting student context
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with errorCode Unauthenticated and Vietnamese message Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục; no attendance record created or updated; CheckInAttempt may log Unauthenticated outcome per API design §6.3

cases.title: TS-05: Login with returnUrl preserves check-in deep link and establishes session
preconditions: Active student account exists with valid credentials
Check-in deep link path is /check-in?token=<valid-token-id>
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with student email, password, and returnUrl /check-in?token=<valid-token-id>
Assert HTTP status 200 and response includes redirectTo matching returnUrl
Assert Set-Cookie header sets wecheck_session HttpOnly cookie
GET /api/v1/auth/me using the issued session cookie
cases.expected: Login returns 200 with user profile, session object (id, expiresAt), and redirectTo /check-in?token=<valid-token-id>; session cookie issued; /auth/me returns authenticated student identity

cases.title: TS-06: Session idle beyond 8 hours rejects check-in with SessionExpired
preconditions: Student has AuthSession row with lastActivityAt more than 8 hours before fixed test clock
TestClock is injected and set to current time
Active session with valid QR token exists
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with expired session cookie or bearer token and valid check-in payload
Assert HTTP status 401
Assert response errorCode SessionExpired
Attempt GET /api/v1/auth/me with the same expired session
cases.expected: Check-in returns HTTP 401 with errorCode SessionExpired and Vietnamese message Phiên đăng nhập đã hết hạn; check-in does not succeed; /auth/me also returns 401

cases.title: AuthService.authenticate persists AuthSession with 8-hour sliding expiry in Postgres
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
identity-auth AuthService is wired to AuthSession repository
Active student user exists with known credentials
steps: Invoke AuthService.authenticate with valid student credentials
Query auth_sessions table for new row with user_id, expires_at, and last_activity_at
Advance TestClock by 8 hours and 1 minute without activity
Invoke AuthService.requireUser(sessionId) with the session id
cases.expected: AuthSession row committed on successful login with expires_at reflecting 8-hour sliding window; requireUser throws or returns invalid after 8+ hours inactivity per FR-02 default

cases.title: AuthSession transitions from valid to expired after inactivity threshold
preconditions: Valid AuthSession exists with last_activity_at at T0
TestClock fixture controls current time
steps: Verify AuthService.requireUser(sessionId) succeeds at T0 + 7h 59m
Advance clock to T0 + 8h 1m without updating last_activity_at
Call AuthService.requireUser(sessionId) again
Query auth_sessions row for revocation or expiry state
cases.expected: Session is valid before 8-hour inactivity boundary; after boundary requireUser fails with session-expired semantics and session is no longer usable for protected actions

cases.title: Successful authenticated request updates last_activity_at sliding window
preconditions: Valid AuthSession exists with last_activity_at at T0
TestClock fixture controls current time
Auth middleware integrated with identity-auth module and real DB
steps: Invoke auth middleware with valid session at T0 + 7h
Query auth_sessions row for updated last_activity_at
Advance clock to T0 + 7h 30m and invoke middleware again
Verify requireUser still succeeds at T0 + 15h 30m (8h after last activity update)
cases.expected: Each authenticated request refreshes last_activity_at; session remains valid for 8 hours from last activity, not from initial login per FR-02 sliding inactivity window

cases.title: POST /auth/login returns 200 with user, session, and optional redirectTo envelope
preconditions: Active student account exists
Request body includes email, password, and returnUrl per API design §2.2
steps: Send POST /api/v1/auth/login with Content-Type application/json and valid credentials plus returnUrl
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body contains user (id, institutionalId, displayName, email, role), session (id, expiresAt), and redirectTo
Assert Set-Cookie wecheck_session is present with HttpOnly attribute
cases.expected: HTTP 200 OK with documented login success envelope; session cookie issued; redirectTo echoes relative returnUrl path

cases.title: GET /auth/me returns 200 User DTO for authenticated session
preconditions: Active student session established via POST /auth/login
Session cookie or Authorization Bearer header is set
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me with valid session credentials
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body contains id, institutionalId, displayName, email, role
Assert response body does not contain passwordHash
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with User DTO for authenticated caller; password fields absent from response per API design §2.4

cases.title: POST /auth/logout returns 204 and revokes current session
preconditions: Authenticated student session is established
auth_sessions row exists for the session id
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/logout with valid session cookie
Assert HTTP status 204 No Content
GET /api/v1/auth/me with the same session cookie
Query auth_sessions table for revoked_at on the session row
cases.expected: HTTP 204 on logout; subsequent /auth/me returns 401; session row has revoked_at set or is deleted per API design §2.3

cases.title: Bearer token Authorization header authenticates mobile web API requests
preconditions: Student logged in via POST /auth/login and session.id captured from response body
No session cookie sent on subsequent requests
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me with Authorization Bearer <sessionId> header and no Cookie header
Assert HTTP status 200 and user profile returned
POST /api/v1/check-in with Bearer token and valid check-in payload
cases.expected: Bearer token accepted as alternate session mechanism per API design §2.1; authenticated requests succeed without wecheck_session cookie

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /check-in without checkin:submit permission
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session is established
Instructor lacks checkin:submit permission per roles matrix §2.2
Active session with valid QR token exists
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and coordinates using Instructor session cookie
Assert response status and error envelope
cases.expected: HTTP 403 Forbidden with localized permission-denied message; no attendance status updated to Present for instructor identity

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET /reports/summary returns 401 before report data is returned
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header is present
Closed sessions with attendance data exist in database
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-2026-PILOT&subjectCode=HESD-WSD&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 without auth
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
cases.expected: HTTP 401 Unauthenticated; no report data returned; protected report action blocked per FR-02 requirement for authenticated session before protected actions

cases.title: Invalid credentials on POST /auth/login returns 401 InvalidCredentials
preconditions: Student account exists with known email
No valid session is established
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with correct email and wrong password
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode InvalidCredentials
Verify no Set-Cookie wecheck_session header is returned
POST /api/v1/check-in without session to confirm still Unauthenticated
cases.expected: Login returns HTTP 401 InvalidCredentials with localized Vietnamese error; no session cookie issued; subsequent check-in remains blocked with 401 Unauthenticated

cases.title: GET /auth/me without session returns 401 Unauthenticated
preconditions: No session cookie or bearer token present
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me without authentication headers
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with errorCode Unauthenticated; no user profile returned

cases.title: Deactivated user login returns 403 AccountDeactivated with no session issued
preconditions: Student account exists with active=false
Credentials are otherwise valid
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with deactivated student email and correct password
Assert HTTP status 403 and errorCode AccountDeactivated
Verify no Set-Cookie wecheck_session header is returned
cases.expected: HTTP 403 AccountDeactivated with localized error; no AuthSession created; deactivated user cannot authenticate per FR-02 and roles §1.4

cases.title: POST /auth/login rate limit exceeded returns 429 after 5 attempts per email
preconditions: Student account exists
No valid session established
Rate limit counter reset for test email
steps: Send 5 consecutive POST /api/v1/auth/login requests with wrong password for the same email
Send 6th login attempt with wrong password
Assert HTTP status 429 and Retry-After header present
cases.expected: 6th login attempt within 15-minute window returns HTTP 429 with errorCode RateLimitExceeded and Retry-After header per API design §10.3 and validation rules §7

cases.title: Unauthenticated check-in deep link redirects to login preserving returnUrl
preconditions: User is not logged in (no wecheck_session cookie)
Mobile browser navigates to /check-in?token=<token-id> from scanned QR deep link
steps: Open /check-in?token=<token-id> in mobile viewport
Observe browser URL changes to /login with returnUrl query parameter encoding the check-in path
Verify check-in page content is not shown and no success confirmation appears
cases.expected: Browser redirects to /login?returnUrl=%2Fcheck-in%3Ftoken%3D<token-id> (or equivalent encoded path); no attendance action occurs; login form is displayed

cases.title: Successful login after redirect returns student to check-in flow
preconditions: Student landed on login page with returnUrl pointing to /check-in?token=<token-id>
Student has valid active account credentials
steps: Enter valid email and password on LoginForm
Submit login
Observe post-login navigation URL and page content
Verify authenticated shell or check-in UI loads with token context preserved
cases.expected: After successful login browser navigates to /check-in?token=<token-id>; session established; scan step renders with token context; GPS capture step does not mount until authenticated GET preflight returns 200 per FR-07 and BR-15

cases.title: Expired session on check-in page shows toast and redirects to login
preconditions: Student session cookie exists but server treats session as expired (lastActivityAt > 8h ago via TestClock)
Student is on /check-in page attempting submission
steps: Trigger check-in submit action on expired session
Observe toast or alert with message Phiên đăng nhập đã hết hạn
Verify redirect to /login with returnUrl preserving check-in path
cases.expected: UI displays session-expired toast per ui-states §401 handling; user redirected to login with returnUrl; check-in does not complete until re-authentication

cases.title: LoginForm displays localized error on invalid credentials
preconditions: User is on /login page (unauthenticated)
Student account exists with known email
steps: Enter valid email and incorrect password on LoginForm
Click login button
Observe error banner or inline message on login form
cases.expected: Login page displays Vietnamese invalid-credentials message Email hoặc mật khẩu không đúng; user remains on login page with no redirect to check-in or role home

cases.title: Role-based redirect after login sends Student, Instructor, and Admin to correct home routes
preconditions: Test accounts exist for Student, Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin roles
Each user is unauthenticated on /login without returnUrl
steps: Log in as Student and observe post-login URL
Log out and log in as Instructor; observe post-login URL
Log out and log in as TrainingOfficeAdmin; observe post-login URL
cases.expected: Student redirects to student home (check-in or history); Instructor to session list or instructor dashboard; Admin to admin home per AuthLayout role-based redirect in ui-ux §06-app-layout-components

cases.title: Deactivated user stale session rejected by auth middleware before protected handler
preconditions: Student user exists with active=false
Stale auth_sessions row still present for that user_id from prior activation
Auth middleware and identity-auth module integrated with real DB
steps: Invoke auth middleware with stale session cookie for deactivated user
Assert middleware rejects request before check-in or report handler executes
Query attendance table to confirm no Present record created
cases.expected: Middleware returns 401 Unauthenticated or SessionExpired semantics; deactivated user cannot access protected routes even with leftover session row per BR-06 and roles §1.4

cases.title: Flow A step 4: Student login gate before check-in submission in happy-path workshop
preconditions: Instructor has opened Active session with valid QR token per Flow A steps 1–3
Student is unauthenticated when scanning QR deep link
steps: Student opens check-in deep link from QR payload
Complete login with valid student credentials and returnUrl preserved
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/<valid-token-id>/preflight with authenticated session; assert HTTP 200 with outcome Valid
POST /api/v1/check-in with authenticated session and valid coordinates
Verify instructor GET /api/v1/sessions/:id/attendance shows Present count incremented
cases.expected: Authentication gate enforced in Flow A: unauthenticated student cannot check in; after login authenticated preflight passes then check-in succeeds and attendance updates; FR-02 satisfied as prerequisite step in end-to-end workshop flow

cases.title: GET /check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight without session returns 401 Unauthenticated
preconditions: No session cookie or Authorization header is present
Active workshop session exists with valid unexpired QR token
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/<valid-token-id>/preflight without auth credentials
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode Unauthenticated
Assert response does not include session summary or enrollment pass payload
cases.expected: Preflight requires authenticated session per FR-07 and BR-06; unauthenticated request blocked with HTTP 401 Unauthenticated and message Vui lòng đăng nhập để tiếp tục; client must not advance to GPS step
